title: Muhasebe Kaynak Eşleşme Raporu
description: ACCOUNT_CARD fişleri — ACTION_TYPE ve ACTION_ID ile kaynak tablo eşleşme durumu
sourceQuery: SELECT AC.CARD_ID, AC.ACTION_DATE, AC.CARD_TYPE, AC.ACTION_TYPE, AC.ACTION_ID, AC.ACTION_ROW_ID, AC.CARD_DETAIL, AC.PAPER_NO, AC.BILL_NO, AC.IS_CANCEL, AC.ACC_COMPANY_ID, AC.ACC_EMPLOYEE_ID, ISNULL(SPC.PROCESS_CAT, 'Diger') AS PROCESS_CAT_NAME, C.FULLNAME AS COMPANY_NAME, CASE WHEN AC.ACTION_ID IS NULL OR AC.ACTION_ID = 0 THEN 'KAYNAK YOK' ELSE 'ESLESME VAR' END AS ESLESME_DURUMU, CASE AC.ACTION_TYPE WHEN 23 THEN 'BANK_ACTIONS' WHEN 25 THEN 'CASH/HAVALE' WHEN 56 THEN 'ALIS_FATURA' WHEN 58 THEN 'FATURA_DIGER' WHEN 59 THEN 'SATIS_FATURA' WHEN 120 THEN 'MASRAF_FISI' WHEN 113 THEN 'STOK_FIS' WHEN 41 THEN 'CARI_DEKONT' ELSE 'TIP_' + CAST(ISNULL(AC.ACTION_TYPE,0) AS NVARCHAR) END AS KAYNAK_TABLO, (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACR.BA = 1 THEN ACR.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM [{schema}].[ACCOUNT_CARD_ROWS] ACR WHERE ACR.CARD_ID = AC.CARD_ID) AS FIS_BORC_TOPLAM, (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACR.BA = 0 THEN ACR.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM [{schema}].[ACCOUNT_CARD_ROWS] ACR WHERE ACR.CARD_ID = AC.CARD_ID) AS FIS_ALACAK_TOPLAM, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM [{schema}].[ACCOUNT_CARD_ROWS] ACR WHERE ACR.CARD_ID = AC.CARD_ID) AS FIS_SATIR_SAYISI FROM [{schema}].[ACCOUNT_CARD] AC WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink_7].[SETUP_PROCESS_CAT] SPC WITH (NOLOCK) ON SPC.PROCESS_CAT_ID = AC.CARD_CAT_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[COMPANY] C WITH (NOLOCK) ON C.COMPANY_ID = AC.ACC_COMPANY_ID
